title: Whistle Mod
description: A lightweight Minecraft mod that allows you to command all your tamed pets to sit or stand simultaneously with a single key.
body:
![5 pets are now sitting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e3ceda96a8028898e88189e2c6efa528147939b_0.webp)

## Whistle Mod ##
Managing a large pack of tamed animals in Minecraft can be tedious. Whether you have an army of wolves or a group of cats, clicking each one individually to make them stay is time-consuming. **Whistle** simplifies this by adding a dedicated _"Whistle"_ keybind.

### How it works
*   **Group Command:** Toggle the sitting state of all your tamed animals (Wolves, Cats, etc.) at once.
*   **Range:** Commands pets within a 64-block radius of the player.
*   **Toggling:** If any of your pets are standing, the whistle will make them all sit. If they are all already sitting, the whistle will make them all stand.
*   **Customizable Keybind:** Default key is `V` (configurable in the controls menu).
